commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts GoogleChat channel Zod schemas from `zod-schema.providers-core.ts` into a dedicated `zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts` module and updates the bundled SDK re-export plus config-footprint guardrail.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR rather than a bug report. The confidence path is source/diff inspection plus the supplied schema import, parse, and contract-test terminal output.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can remove the extra helper export; the rest is ordinary maintainer review.

target.title: refactor(config): extract GoogleChat schema into zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts
target.body:
## Summary

Extract GoogleChat schema (GoogleChatDmSchema, GoogleChatGroupSchema, GoogleChatAccountSchema, GoogleChatConfigSchema) from the monolithic `zod-schema.providers-core.ts` into a dedicated `zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts` module. Update the bundled channel config schema re-export and the config-footprint-guardrails contract test accordingly.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: Extract GoogleChat schema into a dedicated file for maintainability; no behavior change.
- Real environment tested: Linux (x86_64), Node 22.22, local OpenClaw checkout on pr-82100 branch.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --import tsx -e "import { GoogleChatConfigSchema } from './src/config/zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts'; ..."` and `pnpm test:contracts:plugins`
- Evidence after fix:

Terminal transcript:
```text
$ node --import tsx -e "import { GoogleChatConfigSchema, GoogleChatDmSchema, GoogleChatAccountSchema } from './src/config/zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts'; ..."
=== GoogleChat Schema Split Verification ===

1. GoogleChatDmSchema parse test:
   Result: PASS
   Parsed: {"enabled":true,"policy":"pairing"}

2. GoogleChatAccountSchema parse test:
   Result: PASS
   Parsed groupPolicy: allowlist

3. GoogleChatConfigSchema parse test:
   Result: PASS
   defaultAccount: work

4. DM open policy validation (should fail):
   Result: PASS (correctly rejected)

5. DM open policy with wildcard (should pass):
   Result: PASS

All schema validations match expected behavior after split.

$ pnpm test:contracts:plugins
 ✓ |contracts-plugin| src/plugins/contracts/config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts (7 tests) 16ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)
```

- Observed result after fix: All five schema parse/validate cases match expected behavior (including DM open-policy rejection). Contract footprint guardrails pass (7/7). GoogleChatConfigSchema resolves correctly from the new module path.
- What was not tested: Live GoogleChat webhook roundtrip (no service account available locally).
target.author: tanshanshan

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
